#deck:AI-infra-chunks::grammar-feedback
#columns:Text
In {{c1::the}} verifying phase, the model proposes a fix.
column2: Countable singular noun needs an article. You wrote: "In verifying phase".

column1: Fix it if there is a mistake in {{c1::the}} transcription.
It's fine to push directly to {{c1::the}} main branch.
column2: Specific branch → "the". You wrote: "to main branch".

column1: Issue #171 is actually {{c1::an}} error in sentence splitting.
column2: Singular countable noun → a/an; vowel sound → "an".

column1: If the LLM {{c1::thinks}} there is a mistake, it fixes it.
column2: 3rd-person singular present adds -s. You wrote: "if LLM think".

column1: The sentence was {{c1::split}} into two parts.
column2: Irregular verb: split / split / split. Never "splited".

column1: We should fix it in the {{c1::splitting}} phase.
column2: split → splitting (double the t). You wrote: "spliting".

column1: Fix the transcription if it {{c1::is}} wrong.
column2: Present tense for a general rule. You wrote: "if it was wrong".

column1: Issue #171 {{c1::is actually}} a splitting error.
column2: Adverb goes AFTER "be": "is actually", not "actually is".

column1: It's ok to {{c1::push directly}} to main.
column2: Adverb after the verb: "push directly", not "directly push".

column1: Each reference gets two tries, so use the other two {{c1::references}}.
column2: Plural noun after "two". You wrote: "two reference".

column1: I tried these abbreviations {{c1::on}} the Fish Audio website.
Please rerun the TTS {{c1::for}} this sentence.
I got the correct {{c1::pronunciation}} for all of them.
column2: pronunciation = how a word is said; "voice" = the timbre. You wrote: "correct voice".

column1: {{c1::Finally}}, the verifier should also repair the text.
column2: Finally/Lastly for the last item in a list; "At last" = relief after a long wait.

column1: Spelling to fix: {{c1::verifying}}, {{c2::reference}}, {{c3::repository}}.
